## Checklist

- [ ] Focused on a single change, based on `main`
- [ ] `make verify` passes (fmt + lint + test); CI is green
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] If the API changed: ran `make gen-client` (OpenAPI + TS client up to date)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or personal infrastructure in the diff
